roadmaps.name: Frontend Application Development
roadmaps.description: Master modern web development with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and TypeScript. Build production-ready web applications with structured learning.
roadmaps.metaTitle: Frontend Development Roadmap – Learn HTML, CSS, React & JavaScript | Margg
roadmaps.metaDescription: Follow Margg's structured frontend development roadmap. Master HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, TypeScript & more with hands-on projects, mentorship, and career support.
roadmaps.keywords: frontend roadmap, frontend developer path, learn React roadmap, web development roadmap India, frontend course structure

starterKit.title: Communication Skills for Developers
starterKit.description: Build essential communication skills for the tech industry. Learn to present ideas clearly, write effective documentation, and collaborate in team environments.

starterKit.title: JavaScript Fundamentals
starterKit.description: Master the core of JavaScript — variables, functions, closures, promises, and async/await. Build a solid foundation for frontend and backend development.

starterKit.title: Git & GitHub Mastery
starterKit.description: Learn version control with Git and collaborative workflows with GitHub. Master branching, merging, pull requests, and team collaboration best practices.

levels.title: HTML5 & CSS3 Deep Dive
levels.description: Build accessible, SEO-friendly web pages with semantic HTML5 and modern CSS3. Master Flexbox, Grid, animations, and responsive design patterns.

levels.title: DOM & Event Handling
levels.description: Master DOM manipulation and event handling in JavaScript. Learn to create interactive web applications with efficient DOM operations.

levels.title: TypeScript Fundamentals
levels.description: Master TypeScript for scalable JavaScript applications. Learn types, interfaces, generics, and advanced TypeScript features.

levels.title: Responsive Design Mastery
levels.description: Create responsive websites that work on all devices. Learn mobile-first design, CSS Grid, Flexbox, and modern responsive techniques.

levels.title: Advanced JavaScript (ES6+)
levels.description: Deep dive into modern JavaScript — advanced closures, prototypes, async patterns, modules, and performance optimization for production apps.

levels.title: React.js Mastery
levels.description: Build modern web applications with React. Master components, hooks, context, routing, and state management patterns.

addOns.title: Redux & State Management
addOns.description: Master Redux, Redux Toolkit, and modern state management patterns for React applications. Learn when and how to manage complex application state.

addOns.title: Testing React Applications
addOns.description: Comprehensive testing course covering Jest, React Testing Library, and E2E testing with Cypress. Build reliable, well-tested applications.

roadmaps.name: Backend Engineering
roadmaps.description: Build scalable server-side applications with Node.js, Express, databases, and microservices. Master API design, security, and deployment.
roadmaps.metaTitle: Backend Engineering Roadmap – Learn Node.js, APIs & Databases | Margg
roadmaps.metaDescription: Follow Margg's structured backend engineering roadmap. Master Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, microservices & DevOps with real projects and mentorship.
roadmaps.keywords: backend roadmap, backend developer path, learn Node.js roadmap, API development roadmap, backend course India

addOns.description: Secure your backend applications and implement DevOps practices. Learn security best practices, CI/CD, and deployment strategies.

starterKit.description: Essential Linux skills for DevOps engineers. Learn command line, file systems, process management, and basic system administration.

starterKit.description: Introduction to Infrastructure as Code principles. Learn automation, configuration management, and basic scripting for infrastructure.

levels.description: Master Linux fundamentals and system administration. Learn command line, shell scripting, system monitoring, and server management essentials.

levels.title: CI/CD & Automation
levels.description: Build automated CI/CD pipelines and deployment workflows. Master Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and modern DevOps automation practices.

levels.title: Container Orchestration & Kubernetes
levels.description: Master containerization with Docker and orchestration with Kubernetes. Learn microservices deployment, scaling, and management at enterprise scale.

addOns.description: Design and manage cloud infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code. Master Terraform, AWS/Azure services, and cloud architecture patterns.

addOns.description: Implement comprehensive monitoring, alerting, and SRE practices. Learn observability, incident response, and maintaining high-availability systems.

roadmaps.name: Cyber Security Engineering
roadmaps.description: Master network security, penetration testing, threat detection, cloud security, and compliance frameworks to protect digital assets.

starterKit.title: Information Security Fundamentals
starterKit.description: Essential cybersecurity concepts and principles. Learn CIA triad, threat landscape, risk management, and security best practices.

starterKit.title: Network Security Basics
starterKit.description: Foundation of network security concepts. Learn firewalls, VPNs, network protocols, intrusion detection, and secure network design.

starterKit.title: Ethical Hacking Introduction
starterKit.description: Introduction to ethical hacking and penetration testing. Learn vulnerability assessment, testing methodologies, and responsible disclosure.

levels.title: Network Security Fundamentals
levels.description: Master network security basics, protocols, and threat detection. Learn firewalls, VPNs, intrusion detection, and network monitoring fundamentals.

levels.title: Application Security & Penetration Testing
levels.description: Learn web application security, vulnerability assessment, and ethical hacking. Master OWASP Top 10, penetration testing, and security testing methodologies.

levels.title: Advanced Threat Detection & Response
levels.description: Master advanced cybersecurity operations, incident response, and threat hunting. Learn SIEM, SOC operations, digital forensics, and advanced persistent threat detection.

addOns.title: Cloud Security & DevSecOps
addOns.description: Secure cloud infrastructure and implement DevSecOps practices. Learn cloud security frameworks, container security, and security automation in CI/CD pipelines.

addOns.title: Compliance & Risk Management
addOns.description: Master cybersecurity governance, compliance frameworks, and risk assessment. Learn ISO 27001, NIST, SOX compliance, and security program management.
